holdings.infoBox: LSVD is an equity ETF with a total of 136 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.67%, Apple at 4.84%, Alphabet at 4.10%, Amazon.com at 3.71%, and Alphabet at 3.50%.

overview.description: The LSV Disciplined Value ETF (LSVD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of global equity securities considered to be exhibiting value characteristics. LSVD was launched on Dec 17, 2024 and is issued by LSV.
